headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and major callouts. Use 'italic' style for emphasis words.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, navigation, and metadata.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white/50 hover:bg-white/5 uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none

cards.style: bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-white/5 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-white/30 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 rounded-none h-12

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 glassmorphism border-b border-white/5

animations.parallax: Use useScroll and useTransform for hero images

hero_background.usage: Main landing page hero background with heavy dark overlay

events.alt: Silhouette of singer on blue stage
events.usage: Events section background or card headers

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #EDEDED or brighter on dark backgrounds.
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons (player controls).

universal_guidelines: Always use 'Manrope' for body text and 'Playfair Display' for headings.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use solid dark colors + noise texture.
Use 2x padding everywhere. Give content room to breathe.
All interactive elements must have a hover state (brightness-125 or border glow).
Mobile menu must be a full-screen overlay with large typography.
Images must have 'object-cover' and typically 'grayscale' or 'sepia' filters on hover for effect.
DO NOT use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Keep radii small (rounded-sm or rounded-md) or zero for a sharper look.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are present on all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure 'tailwind.config.js' to include the custom colors and fonts defined above.
3. Set up a global CSS file that imports the fonts (Playfair Display, Manrope) from Google Fonts.
4. Create a 'Layout' component that wraps pages and includes the 'Player' component at the bottom.
5. Use the provided image URLs for specific sections. Do not use placeholders.
6. Build the 'BentoGrid' component for the Podcasts and Events pages.
7. Ensure the Admin Panel uses the same dark theme but with higher density data tables.
